title: Recording Artist Contract — Wrecking Zone Records & Wedell Mendez Jr.
notes: Complete contract captured across all pages including cover and both signature blocks. Company signature block is blank/unsigned. This is a real-world recording agreement used as a reference template for contract analysis capabilities.
text:
RECORDING ARTIST CONTRACT

Artist Agreement

Agreement made on the 1/22/2026 between Wedell Mendez Jr. of 7922 Spring Fern Ln Houston TX 77040, referred to herein as Wedell, and Wrecking Zone Records, a corporation with its principal located at 7026 Redwood Falls Drive Pasadena TX 77505, referred to herein as Wrecking Zone Records.

Wedell Mendez Jr. warrants and agrees that, during the Term of 4 years this...

SECTION A:

- Wrecking Zone Records shall have the exclusive right to Wedell Mendez Jr.'s performances for recording purposes. Performances in the entertainment industry of every kind that the services are rendered shall be exclusively used.

- All master recordings and other recordings made during the Term of this Agreement shall be entirely Wrecking Zone Records' property, free from any claims whatsoever by Wedell Mendez Jr. or any person deriving any rights or interest from the Wedell Mendez Jr. in perpetuity throughout the world, including but not limited to the copyright (and all renewals and extensions thereof) therein.

- All costs incurred by Wrecking Zone Records in connection with the production of the recordings (including but not limited to studio costs, payments to producers, musicians and engineers) shall be deemed advances.

- Wedell Mendez Jr.'s compensation shall be limited to the compensation set forth in the applicable collective bargaining agreement, if applicable. In the event no collective bargaining agreement is applicable, Wedell Mendez Jr. waives any right to compensation.

SECTION B:

- All copyrights shall be procured and/or cleared by Wedell Mendez Jr. and Wedell Mendez Jr. shall be available from time to time at Wrecking Zone Records' request to re-record, edit, and/or remix such masters, all in accordance with the terms and conditions.

- Wedell Mendez Jr. hereby gives irrevocable consent for the use of their likeness, image, and/or voice for promotional purposes, including but not limited to album artwork, promotional materials, and social media content, without any payment, royalty, or other compensation due.

SECTION B — MATCHING RIGHTS:

- ...used, the manner of exploitation proposed and, the identities of all proposed parties to the agreement; and (2) Wedell Mendez Jr. offers to enter into an agreement with Wrecking Zone Records, containing the same terms and conditions with respect to advances, costs, royalties and other payments (including, but not limited to, the method of computation and payment) described in Wedell Mendez Jr. notice and otherwise in the same form as this Agreement, but with payments to Wedell Mendez Jr. that are 30% of the payments to Wedell Mendez Jr. in such proposed agreement.

- If Wrecking Zone Record's does not accept Wedell Mendez Jr., offer within 1 day after its receipt, Wedell Mendez Jr. may then enter into that proposed agreement with the same parties mentioned in Wedell Mendez Jr. notice, provided that the agreement is consummated with those Parties within 1 day after the end of that 1-day period upon the same terms and conditions set forth in Wedell Mendez Jr. notice to Wrecking Zone Records.

- If that agreement is not consummated within the 1-day period, no person except Wrecking Zone Records will be authorized to make, sell, broadcast or otherwise exploit such Records and/or Recordings unless, Wedell Mendez Jr. first notifies Wrecking Zone Record's and offers to enter into an agreement with Wrecking Zone Record's as provided in the first sentence of this Paragraph B.

- Wrecking Zone Records will not be required, as a condition of accepting any offer made to it pursuant to this paragraph, to agree to any terms or conditions which cannot be fulfilled by Wrecking Zone Records as readily as by any other person (for example, but not limited to, the employment of a particular producer).

SECTION C:

- Wrecking Zone Records shall have a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to use excerpts from the recordings for promotional purposes, including but not limited to trailers, advertisements, and social media content.

- The royalties provided above include any royalty obligations Wrecking Zone Records may have to any other persons who supply services or rights used in or in connection with the Record and/or Recording performances of Artist, including, but not limited to, producers, extras and music publishers, and any such royalties shall be deducted from the royalties otherwise payable to Wedell Mendez Jr.

INDEMNIFICATION:

- Wedell Mendez Jr. shall indemnify Wrecking Zone Records against any losses, damages, reasonable legal fees and other expenses that Wrecking Zone Records incurs.

10. ARBITRATION:

- Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be submitted to arbitration of the parties hereto. If the parties cannot agree on an arbitrator, each party shall select one arbitrator and both arbitrators shall then select a third. The third arbitrator so selected shall arbitrate said dispute. The arbitration shall be governed by the rules of the American Arbitration Association then in force and effect.

11. ENTIRE AGREEMENT:

- This Agreement shall constitute the entire agreement between the parties and any prior understanding or representation of any kind preceding the date of this Agreement shall not be binding upon either party except to the extent incorporated in this Agreement.

12. MODIFICATION OF AGREEMENT:

- Any modification of this Agreement or additional obligation assumed by either party in connection with this Agreement shall be binding only if placed in writing and signed by each party or an authorized representative of each party.

13. ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS:

- The rights of each party under this Agreement are personal to that party and may not be assigned or transferred to any other person, firm, corporation, or other entity without the prior, express, and written consent of the other party.

14. INTERPRETATION:

- In this Agreement, any reference to a party includes that party's heirs, executors, administrators, successors and assigns, singular includes plural and masculine includes feminine.

WITNESS our signatures as of the day and date first above stated.
(Printed name:
(Signature of Artist:

CONTROLLED COMPOSITION (continued):

- ...each Controlled Composition in Records and/or Recordings and to distribute and to perform those Records and/or Recordings throughout the world, and to authorize others to do so.

- Neither Wrecking Zone Records nor its Licensees will be required to make any payment in connection with those uses, and that license will apply whether or not Wrecking Zone Records or its licensees receives any payment in connection with those Records and/or Recordings.

ROYALTIES:

- Conditioned upon Wedell Mendez Jr. full and faithful performance of all the terms and conditions of this Agreement, Company shall pay Artist royalties as follows: On Records and/or Recordings manufactured for distribution by any Licensee of Wrecking Zone Records, Wedell Mendez Jr. will be entitled to a royalty of 30% of the net money actually received by Company as compensation for the use of the Records and/or Recordings, as computed after deduction of the following amounts: (1) any direct expenses actually incurred by Wrecking Zone Records in connection with the use concerned; and (2) a charge equal to 100% of the gross amount of those receipts, instead of any other deduction for Company's fixed or overhead costs.

- If any item of direct expenses is attributable to receipts from such uses of Master Recordings made under this Agreement and other Master Recordings, then the amount of that expense item which will be deductible in computing net receipts under this paragraph will be determined by apportionment.

- Wrecking Zone Record's will have no obligation to make any payment to Artist in connection with the Records and/or Recordings concerned if it determines, in its sole discretion, to require Artist's consent as a condition of their manufacture and distribution.

SECTION B — EXCLUSIVITY (Dequan Fletcher):

- During the Term of this Agreement, no person other than Wrecking Zone Record's will be authorized to make, sell, broadcast or otherwise exploit Records and/or Recordings featuring the musical performances of Dequan Fletcher unless

- (1) Wedell Mendez Jr. first notifies Company of all of the material terms and conditions of the proposed agreement pursuant to which the material is to be made, sold, broadcast or otherwise exploited including but not limited to the titles of the musical compositions covered by the proposed agreement, the format to be...\n\nCOMPANY SIGNATURE BLOCK:\n\n(Name of Company:\n(Printed name & Office in Corporation:\n(Signature of Officer:\n\n[NOTE: Company signature block is BLANK — unsigned by Wrecking Zone Records officer]

key_concerns: IP ownership in perpetuity — all master recordings belong to label forever, worldwide
All production costs are recoupable advances — artist owes before earns
Compensation waived if no collective bargaining agreement applies
Irrevocable consent for likeness/image use without any payment
Artist must clear all copyrights and re-record at label's request
Exclusive rights across 'every kind' in entertainment — no outside work
Matching rights: artist must offer label 30% discount on any outside deal
1-day acceptance/consummation deadlines — unreasonably short for legal review
If outside deal lapses, rights revert exclusively to Wrecking Zone Records
Label not required to match terms it cannot fulfill — asymmetric obligation
Third-party royalties (producers, publishers) deducted from artist's share, not label's
Artist bears full indemnification for losses, damages, and legal fees
Arbitration clause — disputes resolved privately, not in court
Entire agreement clause supersedes all prior representations
Assignment restriction — but Section 14 includes successors/assigns, creating tension
Section 14 binds heirs, executors, successors — obligations survive death
ROYALTIES TRAP: 30% royalty on net money AFTER deducting 100% of gross receipts for overhead — effectively $0
Controlled compositions: no payment required to artist for distribution/performance worldwide
Label has sole discretion to withhold ALL payment by requiring artist consent as condition
Second artist (Dequan Fletcher) bound by same exclusivity terms
Royalty conditional on 'full and faithful performance' — any minor breach voids all royalties
4-YEAR TERM: artist locked in for 4 years with all the above predatory terms
Contract executed 1/22/2026 — Wrecking Zone Records is a Pasadena TX corporation
Company signature block is BLANK — contract may not be fully executed by label
